title: Sum selected items/rows
excerpt: hi there – i have a relatively simple Board and i was curious if there was a way for Monday to show the Sum total of JUST my selected rows? i have my group total row enabled so i can see totals for each group but sometim…

posts.author: dreborn (Jordan Friedman)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi there – i have a relatively simple Board and i was curious if there was a way for Monday to show the Sum total of JUST my selected rows? i have my group total row enabled so i can see totals for each group but sometimes i just want to see the total of a few selected rows from different groups. Anyway to accomplish this besides selected, exporting to excel, and then manually Sum’ing?

thank you!

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @dreborn! Just hopping in here to see if you were able to find a good solution for this! If not, shoot us a message at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to assist further with this!
